summary: Iteration D - Plan Upload Auto-Update (Part 5) + Diff/Confirm + Image OCR. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend features verified and working.
critical_code_review_comments: All code is clean. server.py inbox section is well-structured with dry_run gating. ai_parser.py parse_image_file has comprehensive lab-specific prompting. UniversalInbox.jsx DiffConfirmView is complete with proper data-testid attributes.

features_tested.inbox_file_dry_run_proposed_true: PASS - dry_run=true returns {proposed: true, parsed, document_id}
features_tested.inbox_file_dry_run_no_transactions: PASS - dry_run=true does NOT create transactions
features_tested.inbox_file_dry_run_no_lab_results: PASS - dry_run=true does NOT create lab_results
features_tested.inbox_file_dry_run_stores_document: PASS - document stored in DB and appears in /documents list
features_tested.inbox_file_no_dry_run_creates_records: PASS - without dry_run, returns counts (backward compat)
features_tested.inbox_apply_all_types: PASS - POST /api/inbox/apply with all selected_types returns counts
features_tested.inbox_apply_only_transactions: PASS - lab_results=0 when not in selected_types
features_tested.inbox_apply_only_lab_results: PASS - transactions=0 when not in selected_types
features_tested.inbox_apply_writes_update_log: PASS - inbox_log count increases after apply
features_tested.diff_confirm_view_appears: PASS - DiffConfirmView shown after file upload with parseable content
features_tested.diff_confirm_parsed_summary: PASS - Summary text from AI displayed in DiffConfirmView
features_tested.diff_confirm_checkboxes_per_type: PASS - 2 checkboxes for Transactions and Lab Results
features_tested.diff_confirm_expand_collapse: PASS - expand shows individual records, collapse hides them
features_tested.diff_confirm_apply_button: PASS - Apply button shows correct count of selected records
features_tested.diff_confirm_apply_button_count_updates: PASS - Apply button text updates to '1 record' after deselecting Transactions
features_tested.diff_confirm_skip_dismisses_modal: PASS - Skip dismisses DiffConfirmView, modal header returns to main state
features_tested.diff_confirm_skip_toast: PASS - Toast 'Records skipped — file is still stored in Documents' shown after Skip
features_tested.diff_confirm_apply_partial: PASS - Applying with Transactions deselected saves only lab_results (+1), no transactions in result
features_tested.vision_ai_badge: PASS - Vision AI badge (Sparkles icon + 'Vision AI' text) appears in DiffConfirmView for image uploads
features_tested.image_ocr_enhanced_prompt: PASS (code review) - parse_image_file in ai_parser.py has lab-specific instructions (lines 105-117)

seed_data_creation: Test transactions, lab results applied via API tests. Test data includes: TEST_APPLY_TX salary (185000), HbA1c_TEST_APPLY (5.6%), TSH tests. Residual data from UI tests (lab results from partial apply tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration D (Part 5) features verified. Backend: 22/22 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_inbox_plan_upload.py. Key flows: dry_run=true on /inbox/file returns {proposed, parsed, document_id} without creating records. /inbox/apply with selected_types=["lab_results"] correctly skips transactions. DiffConfirmView UI works end-to-end. Vision AI badge appears for image uploads. HEIC accepted in file input. No bugs found. Login uses access_token key.
